<unk[3:0:256]><unk[4:0:24 84 97 108 107 80 111 115 105 116 105 118 101]>Different gems offer different kinds of

<unk[3:0:256]><unk[4:0:24 84 97 108 107 80 111 115 105 116 105 118 101]>Customers used to have to supply the
